title: ITU and Black Holes: A Single-Axiom View of Schwarzschild-Kerr Solutions, Bekenstein-Hawking Entropy, the Page Curve, Information Paradox Resolutions, AdS/CFT BHs, Primordial BHs, and the 2026-2050 Observational Roadmap
description:
We apply the Information-Theoretic Unification (ITU) framework (Terada 2026, concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20109209; current latest Tier 0 v3.0 at 10.5281/zenodo.20200156) to black holes (BHs). This is Tier 1 paper #18, the second paper of Block A (Physics/Math deepening) and the specialization of Tier 1 #17 Quantum Gravity (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20230667) to the BH horizon. The ITU polytope reaches 18 vertices with Tier 1 #18 attaining degree 17 (new maximum), making BH the polytope's deepest specialization hub. Pass-1 progress: 126 of 220 phases (57.3 %).

Phase 119 establishes the classical BH solutions. Schwarzschild radius r_s = 2 G M / c^2 for masses spanning 1 M_sun (2.95 km) to 6.6e10 M_sun (1303 AU, TON 618). Kerr outer/inner horizons r_pm vs dimensionless spin a* (extremal: r_+ = r_- = r_s/2). ISCO via Bardeen-Press-Teukolsky 1972: Schwarzschild r_ISCO = 6 r_g = 3 r_s; extremal Kerr prograde r_ISCO = 1 r_g (= horizon); extremal retrograde r_ISCO = 9 r_g. Penrose process maximum efficiency 29.29 % (Christodoulou-Ruffini 1971). No-hair theorem: classical BH described by (M, J, Q) only. ITU: classical BHs = K_geom stationary points; no-hair = K-flow uniqueness condition.

Phase 120 covers BH thermodynamics. Bekenstein-Hawking entropy S_BH = A / (4 l_P^2): 1.05e+79 (10 M_sun stellar) to 4.43e+96 (M87*) nats. Hawking temperature T_H = hbar c^3 / (8 pi G M k_B): 6.17e-09 K (10 M_sun) to 9.49e-18 K (M87*); all observed BHs colder than CMB. Negative heat capacity C = -8 pi G M^2 k_B / (hbar c). Evaporation time t_evap = 5120 pi G^2 M^3 / (hbar c^4): 2.10e+67 yr for solar mass. First law dM c^2 = T_H dS verified to mean rel diff 8.43e-04. ITU: dS = d<K_geom> embedded in BH first law.

Phase 121 presents rigorous Page curve (Page 1993). Haar-random state entropy <S_A> = sum_{k=d_B+1}^{d_A d_B} 1/k - (d_A-1)/(2 d_B) matches log approximation within 0.01 at d_total = 64. BH evaporation M(t) = M_0 (1 - t/t_evap)^{1/3} gives S_BH(t) = S_BH(0) (1 - t/t_evap)^{2/3}. Page time t_Page = 0.643 t_evap (non-linear M(t) shifts from toy t_Page = 0.5). Pure-state mutual info I(R:B) max = 0.997; conditional entropy S(R|B) negative confirms quantum entanglement (classical forbidden). QECC interpretation (Page-Yang 1998, HaPPY tensor 2015): BH stores 10^{77}-10^{98} logical qubits.

Phase 122 unifies 7 information-paradox resolution proposals. Fuzzball (Mathur 2005): BH = exp(S_BH) microstate geometries. Soft hair (Hawking-Perry-Strominger 2016): horizon supertranslation modes scaling as 4 S_BH. Maldacena-Maoz (2004): 2-sided AdS-Schwarzschild = thermofield double entanglement (ER=EPR seed). BH complementarity (Susskind 1993): observer-dependent K-frames, monogamy preserved. Holography of information (Laddha-Prabhu-Raju-Shrivastava 2020): S_BH = S_infinity exactly. Plus Island formula (Penington 2019, Almheiri et al. 2019) and ER=EPR (Maldacena-Susskind 2013). All 7 resolutions are projections of ITU axiom dS = d<K> from different K-flow viewpoints.

Phase 123 covers AdS/CFT BHs. AdS-Schwarzschild minimum temperature T_min at r_h^min = sqrt((d-2)/d) L_AdS = 0.707 (d=4). Hawking-Page phase transition (1983): T_HP = (d-1)/(2 pi L_AdS) = 0.4775; below T_HP thermal AdS dominates, above T_HP AdS-BH dominates (CFT confinement-deconfinement, Witten 1998). Bekenstein bound S <= 2 pi k_B R E / (hbar c) saturated by Schwarzschild BH (ratio = 1.0 for all masses). Holographic complexity (Susskind 2014): CV / CA conjectures predict dC/dt = 2 E / (pi hbar) Lloyd-bound saturation; for M = 10 M_sun, dC/dt ~ 1.08e+82 operations/s.

Phase 124 develops the Maxwell-demon connection. Landauer's bound DeltaE_min = k_B T ln 2 per bit: 1.79e-2 eV at room T, 5.97e-7 eV at 0.01 K (quantum computer). BH = ultimate Maxwell demon: DeltaE/bit = k_B T_H ln 2 minimized for massive BHs (3.68e-12 eV/bit for 1 M_sun, 5.67e-22 eV/bit for M87*). Hawking radiation mutual info I(R_i:R_j) spikes after Page time (zero before, 1.16 at t=0.9 t_evap). Petz map (1986) decoder fidelity rises sharply at t_Page (Hayden-Preskill 2007). Quantum-computer BH simulation: SYK / JT gravity tractable on 100-1000 qubit QPUs (IBM Eagle 127, IBM Condor 1121, Atom Computing 1180), Page curve observable (Niezgoda et al. 2022). ITU triangle: Quantum Computing (Tier 1 #1) <-> Black Holes (#18) <-> ITU axiom.

Phase 125 covers primordial BHs (Hawking 1971, Carr-Hawking 1974), higher-order correlations, and BH merger statistics. PBH formation mass M ~ c^3 t / G spans 1.09e-38 M_sun (Planck epoch) to 6.09e+17 M_sun (recombination); QCD epoch ~ stellar mass, t = 1 s ~ 10^5 M_sun SMBH seed candidate. PBH dark matter constraint windows: asteroid mass 10^17-10^22 g remains open for 100 % DM. Scrambling time t_scr = (beta / 2 pi) log S_BH (Maldacena-Shenker-Stanford 2016 chaos bound): 3.5e-3 s for 1 M_sun, 0.90 yr for M87*. BBH mass distribution (GWTC-3 / GWTC-4-like): power-law alpha = 2.5, peak 30-50 M_sun, pair-instability gap 45-80 M_sun. Merger rate R_BBH = 17-39 /Gpc^3/yr constrains f_PBH < ~10 % in stellar mass range.

Phase 126 integrates 8 phases under K_horizon (K_geom restricted to BH horizon). 18-vertex polytope: 93 edges (76 + 17 new), avg degree 10.33. Tier 1 #18 couples strongly (>=0.75) to #17 QG (1.00, parent), #1 QC (0.85, QECC), #10 Energy (0.85, Bekenstein); medium (0.50-0.75) to #11 Climate, #14 Communications; average coupling 0.382. Tier 1 #17 (general K_geom) and Tier 1 #18 (BH specialization) form a symmetric pair phase-by-phase. Ten falsifiable predictions for 2026-2050: EHT M87* 5 uas refinement 2030 P=0.90, GWTC-5 300+ BBH (LIGO O5) 2030 P=0.85, Sgr A* Kerr deviation <1% 2035 P=0.75, LISA IMBH (10^2-10^5 M_sun) 2038 P=0.70, pair-instability gap verified 2032 P=0.65, PBH asteroid-mass window constrained 2038 P=0.55, quantum-computer 100-qubit BH simulation 2032 P=0.70, BMV gravitational entanglement 2032 P=0.65, Hawking-Page CFT realized 2040 P=0.40, SMBH origin resolved 2045 P=0.45. Grand P_avg = 0.660 (above Tier 1 #17 = 0.625 and #1-#16 = 0.59). Strong/Medium = 7/3.

Central thesis: ITU axiom delta S(rho_A) = delta Tr[K_A^(0) rho_A] specializes naturally to K_horizon at BH horizons, unifying classical BH solutions, Bekenstein-Hawking thermodynamics, Hawking radiation, Page curve, information-paradox resolutions, AdS/CFT BH physics, holographic complexity, quantum-computer BH simulations, and PBH cosmology under a single principle. The 18-vertex polytope demonstrates BH as the polytope's deepest specialization hub. EHT next-generation 5 uas precision (2030) and GWTC-5 statistics (LIGO O5) provide the strongest near-term tests, with quantum-computer BH simulation (100-qubit, 2032) and BMV gravitational entanglement (2032) opening direct quantum tests. Pass-2 (Phase 222) will derive ITU-specific BH predictions: novel quasi-normal-mode corrections, exact Hawking radiation mutual-information profiles, bulk-reconstruction algorithms, pre-merger waveform corrections, and replica-wormhole numerics.

Honest framing: this is a Pass-1 interpretive paper. Numerical results agree with established literature (Schwarzschild 1916, Kerr 1963, Bekenstein 1973, Hawking 1975, Bardeen-Carter-Hawking 1973, Page 1993, Maldacena-Susskind 2013, Penington 2019, etc.). No new physical predictions beyond what the cited works already contain; the contribution is the unified ITU axiom narrative under K_horizon and the symmetric pairing with Tier 1 #17 QG.

Includes 8 theory documents (theory_phase119-126.md), 8 Python numerical experiments, 8 figures (PNG), 8 JSON summaries. Total runtime ~12 seconds.
